mapper.sql: select d.group_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.group_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time from ai_group d
mapper.select: select d.group_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.group_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, (select group_name from ai_group where group_id = d.parent_id) parent_name from ai_group d where d.group_id = #{groupId}
select count(1) from ai_device_group where group_id = #{groupId}
select count(1) from ai_group where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{groupId} limit 1
select * from ai_group where find_in_set(#{groupId}, ancestors)
select count(*) from ai_group where status = 0 and del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(#{groupId}, ancestors)
where group_name=#{groupName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_group( group_id, parent_id, group_name, ancestors, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_by, create_time )values( #{groupId}, #{parentId}, #{groupName}, #{ancestors}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update ai_group set status = '0' where group_id in
#{groupId}
mapper.delete: update ai_group set del_flag = '2' where group_id = #{groupId}
